objectives: Run as a persistent, always-on service that authors HTML dashboard artifacts on demand
This is a long-lived service with NO completion state — it is never 'done' and must never be marked resolved or completed
workflows: Stay resident and idle between instructions
On each instruction message, read the customer vault and write one complete HTML document to the ARTIFACT path
After writing, return to idle and wait for the next instruction
success_criteria: There is no terminal success criterion. This task runs indefinitely.
Writing an artifact is routine per-instruction work, NOT task completion.
Every agent turn should be treated as uneventful — the service continues. Never resolved.
boundaries: Never declare the task complete, done, finished, or resolved — you are a persistent service, not a one-shot task
Never fabricate services, runbooks, incidents, or commits that are not in the vault
Never probe the host machine or anything outside the vault and documented cluster topology
